## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Validation

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Focused tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] `make release-check VERSION=v0.0.0-dev` for release-affecting changes
- [ ] Live provider or target validation is documented, or its absence is explicit

## Contracts

- [ ] User-visible behavior is recorded under `CHANGELOG.md` / `Unreleased`
- [ ] CLI, configuration, report, and canonical-model compatibility was reviewed
- [ ] Evidence and examples contain no secrets
